name: budgetTrack
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.lines.every(function(l){ return Number.isFinite(l.budgeted) && Number.isFinite(l.actual) && Number.isFinite(l.variance); })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler backing CreativeActionPanel.tsx 'Budget JSON' → Budget. Component renders r.result.{totalBudgeted, totalActual, totalVariance, overBudget, lines[].{category,budgeted,actual,status}}; field-aligned 2026-06. Accepts line-item lines[] OR budget+expenses[] roll-up. POISON: budgeted/actual via cvNum so '1e999'/'Infinity'/'NaN' collapse to 0; every line + total stays FINITE. Deterministic pure compute.
